meta.title: China offered Taiwanese pilot $16 million to defect with a CH-47!
meta.description:
China offered a Taiwanese military pilot $16 million to defect with an American-sourced CH-47 Chinook heavy-lift helicopter earlier this year, with plans to land the rotorcraft aboard an amphibious assault ship sailing through the nearby Taiwan Strait.

Read our coverage on Sandboxx News:
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/china-offered-taiwanese-pilot-15-million-to-defect-with-us-helicopter/

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
